MQTT and notification actions are\n528\t// reported as simulated (not executed). Test firings do NOT update last_fired,\n529\t// do NOT increment error counts, and do NOT disable the trigger on 4xx responses.\n530\t//\n531\t// Response 200 (application/json):\n532\t//\n533\t//\t{\n534\t//\t  \"status\": \"ok\",\n535\t//\t  \"response_ms\": 42,\n536\t//\t  \"actions\": [{\n537\t//\t    \"type\": \"webhook\",\n538\t//\t    \"url\": \"http://example.com/hook\",\n539\t//\t    \"status\": 200,\n540\t//\t    \"response_ms\": 42\n541\t//\t  }]\n542\t//\t}\n543\t//\n544\t// Response 404: trigger not found.\n545\t// Response 500: failed to marshal test payload.\n546\tfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) testTrigger(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n547\t\tid := chi.URLParam(r, \"id\")\n548\t\n549\t\ttrigger, err := h.store.Get(id)\n550\t\tif err != nil {\n551\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"trigger not found\", http.StatusNotFound)\n552\t\t\treturn\n553\t\t}\n554\t\n555\t\tnow := time.Now()\n556\t\n557\t\t// Build synthetic payload per spec:\n558\t\t// {trigger_id, trigger_name, condition, blob_id, person, position:{x,y,z}, zone, dwell_s, timestamp_ms}\n559\t\tpayload := map[string]interface{}{\n560\t\t\t\"trigger_id\":   trigger.ID,\n561\t\t\t\"trigger_name\": trigger.Name,\n562\t\t\t\"condition\":    trigger.Condition,\n563\t\t\t\"blob_id\":      0,\n564\t\t\t\"person\":       nil,\n565\t\t\t\"position\": map[string]float64{\"x\": 0, \"y\": 0, \"z\": 0},\n566\t\t\t\"zone\":         nil,\n567\t\t\t\"dwell_s\":      0,\n568\t\t\t\"timestamp_ms\":  now.UnixMilli(),\n569\t\t}\n570\t\n571\t\tdata, err := json.Marshal(payload)\n572\t\tif err != nil {\n573\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"failed to marshal test payload\", http.StatusInternalServerError)\n574\t\t\treturn\n575\t\t}\n576\t\n577\t\t// Execute each action and collect results\n578\t\tvar results []ActionResult\n579\t\ttotalStart := time.Now()\n580\t\n581\t\tfor _, action := range trigger.Actions {\n582\t\t\tresult := ActionResult{Type: action.Type}\n583\t\n584\t\t\tswitch action.Type {\n585\t\t\tcase \"webhook\":\n586\t\t\t\turl, ok := action.Params[\"url\"].(string)\n587\t\t\t\tif ok && url != \"\" {\n588\t\t\t\t\tresult.URL = url\n589\t\t\t\t\tstatusCode, latencyMs, err := h.doWebhookPost(url, data, action.Params)\n590\t\t\t\t\tresult.Status = statusCode\n591\t\t\t\t\tresult.ResponseMs = latencyMs\n592\t\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n593\t\t\t\t\t\tresult.Error = err.Error()\n594\t\t\t\t\t}\n595\t\t\t\t} else {\n596\t\t\t\t\tresult.Error = \"missing url\"\n597\t\t\t\t}\n598\t\n599\t\t\tcase \"mqtt\":\n600\t\t\t\tresult.URL, _ = action.Params[\"topic\"].(string)\n601\t\t\t\tif result.URL == \"\" {\n602\t\t\t\t\tresult.URL = \"(no topic)\"\n603\t\t\t\t}\n604\t\t\t\tresult.Error = \"test mode — mqtt not executed\"\n605\t\n606\t\t\tdefault:\n607\t\t\t\tresult.URL = \"(n/a)\"\n608\t\t\t\tresult.Error = \"test mode — action type not executable\"\n609\t\t\t}\n610\t\n611\t\t\tresults = append(results, result)\n612\t\t}\n613\t\n614\t\ttotalMs := time.Since(totalStart).Milliseconds()\n615\t\n616\t\tresp := WebhookTestResult{\n617\t\t\tStatus:    \"ok\",\n618\t\t\tResponseMs: totalMs,\n619\t\t\tActions:   results,\n620\t\t}\n621\t\n622\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusOK, resp)\n623\t}\n624\t\n625\t// enableTrigger handles POST /api/triggers/{id}/enable.\n626\t//\n627\t// Clears the error state (error_message and error_count) and re-enables the trigger.\n628\t//\n629\t// Response 200 (application/json): {\"status\": \"ok\"}\n630\t// Response 404: trigger not found.\n631\tfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) enableTrigger(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n632\t\tid := chi.URLParam(r, \"id\")\n633\t\n634\t\tif err := h.store.EnableTrigger(id); err != nil {\n635\t\t\thttp.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusNotFound)\n636\t\t\treturn\n637\t\t}\n638\t\n639\t\t// Broadcast updated trigger state to dashboard\n640\t\th.broadcastTriggerState(id)\n641\t\n642\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]interface{}{\"status\": \"ok\"})\n643\t}\n644\t\n645\t// disableTrigger handles POST /api/triggers/{id}/disable.\n646\t//\n647\t// Disables a trigger. The trigger will no longer be evaluated until re-enabled.\n648\t//\n649\t// Response 200 (application/json): {\"status\": \"ok\"}\n650\t// Response 404: trigger not found.\n651\t// Response 500: database error.\n652\tfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) disableTrigger(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n653\t\tid := chi.URLParam(r, \"id\")\n654\t\n655\t\ttrigger, err := h.store.Get(id)\n656\t\tif err != nil {\n657\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"trigger not found\", http.StatusNotFound)\n658\t\t\treturn\n659\t\t}\n660\t\n661\t\ttrigger.Enabled = false\n662\t\tif err := h.store.Update(trigger); err != nil {\n663\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"failed to update trigger\", http.StatusInternalServerError)\n664\t\t\treturn\n665\t\t}\n666\t\n667\t\t// Broadcast updated trigger state to dashboard\n668\t\th.broadcastTriggerState(id)\n669\t\n670\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]interface{}{\"status\": \"ok\"})\n671\t}\n672\t\n673\t// getWebhookLog handles GET /api/triggers/{id}/webhook-log.\n674\t//\n675\t// Returns the most recent webhook firing log entries for a specific trigger.\n676\t// Entries include URL, timestamp, HTTP status code, latency, and any error message.\n677\t//\n678\t// Query parameters:\n679\t//   - limit: maximum entries to return (default 20, max 100)\n680\t//\n681\t// Response 200 (application/json): array of webhook log entries.\n682\tfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) getWebhookLog(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n683\t\tid := chi.URLParam(r, \"id\")\n684\t\n685\t\tlimitStr := r.URL.Query().Get(\"limit\")\n686\t\tlimit := 20\n687\t\tif limitStr != \"\" {\n688\t\t\tif l, err := strconv.Atoi(limitStr); err == nil && l > 0 && l <= 100 {\n689\t\t\t\tlimit = l\n690\t\t\t}\n691\t\t}\n692\t\n693\t\tentries := h.store.GetWebhookLog(id, limit)\n694\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusOK, entries)\n695\t}\n696\t\n697\t// getTriggerLog handles GET /api/triggers/log.\n698\t//\n699\t// Returns the most recent trigger firing events across all triggers.\n700\t//\n701\t// Query parameters:\n702\t//   - limit: maximum entries to return (default 10, max 100)\n703\t//\n704\t// Response 200 (application/json): array of firing records.\n705\tfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) getTriggerLog(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n706\t\t// Get limit from query param (default 10, max 100)\n707\t\tlimitStr := r.URL.Query().Get(\"limit\")\n708\t\tlimit := 10\n709\t\tif limitStr != \"\" {\n710\t\t\tif l, err := strconv.Atoi(limitStr); err == nil && l > 0 && l <= 100 {\n711\t\t\t\tlimit = l\n712\t\t\t}\n713\t\t}\n714\t\n715\t\trecords := h.store.GetRecentFirings(limit)\n716\t\n717\t\t// Convert to response format\n718\t\tresponse := make([]map[string]interface{}, 0, len(records))\n719\t\tfor _, r := range records {\n720\t\t\tresponse = append(response, map[string]interface{}{\n721\t\t\t\t\"trigger_id\":   r.TriggerID,\n722\t\t\t\t\"trigger_name\": r.TriggerName,\n723\t\t\t\t\"condition\":    r.Condition,\n724\t\t\t\t\"fired_at\":     r.FiredAt.Format(time.RFC3339),\n725\t\t\t})\n726\t\t}\n727\t\n728\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusOK, response)\n729\t}\n730\t\n731\t// isValidShape validates that a shape has all required fields.\n732\tfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) isValidShape(shape *volume.ShapeJSON) bool {\n733\t\tswitch shape.Type {\n734\t\tcase volume.ShapeBox:\n735\t\t\treturn shape.X != nil && shape.Y != nil && shape.Z != nil &&\n736\t\t\t\tshape.W != nil && shape.D != nil && shape.H != nil &&\n737\t\t\t\t*shape.W > 0 && *shape.D > 0 && *shape.H > 0\n738\t\tcase volume.ShapeCylinder:\n739\t\t\treturn shape.CX != nil && shape.CY != nil && shape.Z != nil &&\n740\t\t\t\tshape.R != nil && shape.H != nil &&\n741\t\t\t\t*shape.R > 0 && *shape.H > 0\n742\t\tdefault:\n743\t\t\treturn false\n744\t\t}\n745\t}\n746\t\n747\t// toResponse converts a trigger to the API response format.\n748\tfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) toResponse(t *volume.Trigger, now time.Time) *TriggerResponse {\n749\t\tresp := &TriggerResponse{\n750\t\t\tID:             t.ID,\n751\t\t\tName:           t.Name,\n752\t\t\tShape:          t.Shape,\n753\t\t\tCondition:      t.Condition,\n754\t\t\tConditionParams: t.ConditionParams,\n755\t\t\tTimeConstraint: t.TimeConstraint,\n756\t\t\tActions:        t.Actions,\n757\t\t\tEnabled:        t.Enabled,\n758\t\t\tErrorMessage:  t.ErrorMessage,\n759\t\t\tErrorCount:     t.ErrorCount,\n760\t\t\tLastFired:      t.LastFired,\n761\t\t\tCreatedAt:      t.CreatedAt,\n762\t\t\tUpdatedAt:      t.UpdatedAt,\n763\t\t}\n764\t\n765\t\tif t.LastFired != nil {\n766\t\t\tresp.Elapsed = int(now.Sub(*t.LastFired).Seconds())\n767\t\t}\n768\t\n769\t\treturn resp\n770\t}\n771\t\n772\t// EvaluateTriggers is called by the fusion engine to evaluate triggers.\n773\t// Returns a list of trigger IDs that fired.\n774\tfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) EvaluateTriggers(blobs []volume.BlobPos) []string {\n775\t\treturn h.store.Evaluate(blobs, time.Now())\n776\t}\n777\t\n778\t// IsInVolume checks if a point is inside a trigger volume.\n779\tfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) IsInVolume(triggerID string, x, y, z float64) bool {\n780\t\treturn h.store.IsInVolume(triggerID, x, y, z)\n781\t}\n782\t\n783\t// onTriggerFired is called by the volume store when a trigger fires.\n784\tfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) onTriggerFired(event volume.FiredEvent) {\n785\t\tt := h.store.GetTrigger(event.TriggerID)\n786\t\tif t == nil {\n787\t\t\treturn\n788\t\t}\n789\t\n790\t\t// Execute all actions\n791\t\tfor _, action := range t.Actions {\n792\t\t\th.executeAction(action, event)\n793\t\t}\n794\t\n795\t\t// Broadcast trigger state to dashboard\n796\t\th.mu.RLock()\n797\t\tbroadcaster := h.wsBroadcaster\n798\t\th.mu.RUnlock()\n799\t\tif broadcaster != nil {\n800\t\t\tbroadcaster.BroadcastTriggerState(t.ID, t.Name, event.Timestamp, t.Enabled)\n801\t\t}\n802\t\n803\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Trigger fired: %s (%s, %d blob(s))\", t.Name, t.Condition, len(event.BlobIDs))\n804\t}\n805\t\n806\t// executeAction executes a single trigger action.\n807\tfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) executeAction(action volume.Action, event volume.FiredEvent) {\n808\t\tswitch action.Type {\n809\t\tcase \"webhook\":\n810\t\t\th.executeWebhook(action, event)\n811\t\tcase \"mqtt\":\n812\t\t\th.executeMQTT(action, event)\n813\t\tcase \"ntfy\", \"pushover\":\n814\t\t\th.executeNotification(action, event)\n815\t\t}\n816\t}\n817\t\n818\t// doWebhookPost sends an HTTP POST and returns status code, latency, error.\n819\t// This is the low-level webhook call shared by normal firing and test.\n820\tfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) doWebhookPost(url string, data []byte, params map[string]interface{}) (statusCode int, latencyMs int64, err error) {\n821\t\treq, err := http.NewRequest(\"POST\", url, bytes.NewReader(data))\n822\t\tif err != nil {\n823\t\t\treturn 0, 0, fmt.Errorf(\"create request: %w\", err)\n824\t\t}\n825\t\n826\t\treq.Header.Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json\")\n827\t\n828\t\t// Add custom headers from action params\n829\t\tfor k, v := range params {\n830\t\t\tif k != \"url\" {\n831\t\t\t\tif headerStr, ok := v.(string); ok {\n832\t\t\t\t\treq.Header.Set(k, headerStr)\n833\t\t\t\t}\n834\t\t\t}\n835\t\t}\n836\t\n837\t\tstart := time.Now()\n838\t\tresp, err := h.httpClient.Do(req)\n839\t\tlatencyMs = time.Since(start).Milliseconds()\n840\t\n841\t\tif err != nil {\n842\t\t\treturn 0, latencyMs, fmt.Errorf(\"request failed: %w\", err)\n843\t\t}\n844\t\tdefer resp.Body.Close()\n845\t\t// Drain body to allow connection reuse\n846\t\tio.Copy(io.Discard, resp.Body)\n847\t\n848\t\treturn resp.StatusCode, latencyMs, nil\n849\t}\n850\t\n851\t// executeWebhook sends an HTTP POST to a webhook URL with fault tolerance.\n852\t// - 4xx: disable trigger, set error_message, push WS alert, log webhook_log\n853\t// - 5xx / timeout: log warning, increment error_count, do NOT disable\n854\t// - 2xx: reset error_count, log webhook_log\n855\tfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) executeWebhook(action volume.Action, event volume.FiredEvent) {\n856\t\turl, ok := action.Params[\"url\"].(string)\n857\t\tif !ok || url == \"\" {\n858\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Webhook action missing URL\")\n859\t\t\treturn\n860\t\t}\n861\t\n862\t\t// Build payload per spec:\n863\t\t// {trigger_id, trigger_name, condition, blob_id, person, position:{x,y,z}, zone, dwell_s, timestamp_ms}\n864\t\tt := h.store.GetTrigger(event.TriggerID)\n865\t\tpayload := map[string]interface{}{\n866\t\t\t\"trigger_id\": Test firings do NOT update last_fired, do NOT increment error counts, and do NOT disable the trigger on 4xx responses.\n214\t//\t\t@Tags\t\t\ttriggers\n215\t//\t\t@Produce\t\tjson\n216\t//\t\t@Param\t\t\tid\tpath\t\tstring\ttrue\t\"Trigger ID\"\n217\t//\t\t@Success\t\t200\t{object}\tWebhookTestResult\t\"Test fire results with per-action status\"\n218\t//\t\t@Failure\t\t404\t{object}\tmap[string]string\t\"Trigger not found\"\n219\t//\t\t@Failure\t\t500\t{object}\tmap[string]string\t\"Failed to marshal test payload\"\n220\t//\t\t@Router\t\t\t/api/triggers/{id}/test [post]\n221\t//\n222\t//\tPOST /api/triggers/{id}/enable\n223\t//\n224\t//\t@Summary\t\tEnable a trigger\n225\t//\t\t@Description\tClears the error state (error_message and error_count) and re-enables the trigger.\n226\t//\t\t@Tags\t\t\ttriggers\n227\t//\t\t@Produce\t\tjson\n228\t//\t\t@Param\t\t\tid\tpath\t\tstring\ttrue\t\"Trigger ID\"\n229\t//\t\t@Success\t\t200\t{object}\tmap[string]string\t\"ok\"\n230\t//\t\t@Failure\t\t404\t{object}\tmap[string]string\t\"Trigger not found\"\n231\t//\t\t@Router\t\t\t/api/triggers/{id}/enable [post]\n232\t//\n233\t//\tPOST /api/triggers/{id}/disable\n234\t//\n235\t//\t@Summary\t\tDisable a trigger\n236\t//\t\t@Description\tDisables a trigger. Entries include URL, timestamp, HTTP status code, latency, and any error message.\n249\t//\t\t@Tags\t\t\ttriggers\n250\t//\t\t@Produce\t\tjson\n251\t//\t\t@Param\t\t\tid\t\tpath\t\tstring\ttrue\t\"Trigger ID\"\n252\t//\t\t@Param\t\t\tlimit\tquery\t\tint\t\tfalse\t\"Max entries to return (default 20, max 100)\"\n253\t//\t\t@Success\t\t200\t{array}\t\tvolume.WebhookLogEntry\t\"Webhook log entries\"\n254\t//\t\t@Router\t\t\t/api/triggers/{id}/webhook-log [get]\n255\t//\n256\t//\tGET /api/triggers/log\n257\t//\n258\t//\t@Summary\t\tRecent trigger firing log\n259\t//\t\t@Description\tReturns the most recent trigger firing events across all triggers.\n260\t//\t\t@Tags\t\t\ttriggers\n261\t//\t\t@Produce\t\tjson\n262\t//\t\t@Param\t\t\tlimit\tquery\t\tint\t\tfalse\t\"Max entries to return (default 10, max 100)\"\n263\t//\t\t@Success\t\t200\t{array}\t\tmap[string]interface{}\t\"Firing records\"\n264\t//\t\t@Router\t\t\t/api/triggers/log [get]\n265\tfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) RegisterRoutes(r chi.Router) {\n266\t\tr.Get(\"/api/triggers\", h.listTriggers)\n267\t\tr.Post(\"/api/triggers\", h.createTrigger)\n268\t\tr.Get(\"/api/triggers/{id}\", h.getTrigger)\n269\t\tr.Put(\"/api/triggers/{id}\", h.updateTrigger)\n270\t\tr.Delete(\"/api/triggers/{id}\", h.deleteTrigger)\n271\t\tr.Post(\"/api/triggers/{id}/test\", h.testTrigger)\n272\t\tr.Post(\"/api/triggers/{id}/enable\", h.enableTrigger)\n273\t\tr.Post(\"/api/triggers/{id}/disable\", h.disableTrigger)\n274\t\tr.Get(\"/api/triggers/{id}/webhook-log\", h.getWebhookLog)\n275\t\tr.Get(\"/api/triggers/log\", h.getTriggerLog)\n276\t}\n277\t\n278\t// listTriggers handles GET /api/triggers.\n279\t//\n280\t// Returns all registered automation triggers as a JSON array. (application/json):\n285\t//\n286\t//\t[{\n287\t//\t  \"id\": \"1\",\n288\t//\t  \"name\": \"Couch Dwell\",\n289\t//\t  \"shape\": {\"type\": \"box\", \"x\": 1, \"y\": 2, \"z\": 0, \"w\": 1, \"d\": 1, resp)\n331\t}\n332\t\n333\t// volumeCreateTriggerRequest is the request body for POST /api/triggers.\n334\ttype volumeCreateTriggerRequest struct {\n335\t\tName            string                   `json:\"name\"`\n336\t\tShape           volume.ShapeJSON         `json:\"shape\"`\n337\t\tCondition       string                   `json:\"condition\"`\n338\t\tConditionParams volume.ConditionParams \"z\": 0, \"w\": 1, \"d\": 1, \"h\": 1.5},\n355\t//\t  \"condition\": \"dwell\",\n356\t//\t  \"condition_params\": {\"duration_s\": 30},\n357\t//\t  \"time_constraint\": {\"from\": \"22:00\", \"to\": createTrigger(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n366\t\tvar req volumeCreateTriggerRequest\n367\t\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {\n368\t\t\thttp.Error(w, enabled,\n410\t\t}\n411\t\n412\t\tid, err := h.store.Create(trigger)\n413\t\tif err != nil {\n414\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"failed to create trigger\",             `json:\"name,omitempty\"`\n434\t\tShape           *volume.ShapeJSON        `json:\"shape,omitempty\"`\n435\t\tCondition       *string err != nil {\n465\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"invalid request body\", http.StatusBadRequest)\n466\t\t\treturn\n467\t\t}\n468\t\n469\t\t// Apply updates\n470\t\tif req.Name != nil {\n471\t\t\ttrigger.Name = *req.Name\n472\t\t}\n473\t\tif req.Shape != nil {\n474\t\t\tif !h.isValidShape(req.Shape) {\n475\t\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"invalid shape geometry\", http.StatusBadRequest)\n476\t\t\t\treturn\n477\t\t\t}\n478\t\t\ttrigger.Shape = *req.Shape\n479\t\t}\n480\t\tif req.Condition != nil {\n481\t\t\ttrigger.Condition = *req.Condition\n482\t\t}\n483\t\tif req.ConditionParams != nil {\n484\t\t\ttrigger.ConditionParams = *req.ConditionParams\n485\t\t}\n486\t\tif req.TimeConstraint != nil {\n487\t\t\ttrigger.TimeConstraint = req.TimeConstraint\n488\t\t}\n489\t\tif req.Actions != nil {\n490\t\t\ttrigger.Actions = *req.Actions\n491\t\t}\n492\t\tif req.Enabled != nil {\n493\t\t\ttrigger.Enabled = *req.Enabled\n494\t\t}\n495\t\n496\t\tif err := h.store.Update(trigger); MQTT and notification actions are\n528\t// reported as simulated (not executed). Test firings do NOT update last_fired,\n529\t// do NOT increment error counts, and do NOT disable the trigger on 4xx responses.\n530\t//\n531\t// Response 200 (application/json):\n532\t//\n533\t//\t{\n534\t//\t  \"status\": \"ok\",\n535\t//\t  \"response_ms\": 42,\n536\t//\t  \"actions\": [{\n537\t//\t    \"type\": \"webhook\",\n538\t//\t    \"url\": \"http://example.com/hook\",\n539\t//\t    \"status\": 200,\n540\t//\t    \"response_ms\": 42\n541\t//\t  }]\n542\t//\t}\n543\t//\n544\t// Response 404: trigger not found.\n545\t// Response 500: failed to marshal test payload.\n546\tfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) testTrigger(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n547\t\tid := chi.URLParam(r, \"id\")\n548\t\n549\t\ttrigger, err := h.store.Get(id)\n550\t\tif err != nil {\n551\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"trigger not found\", http.StatusNotFound)\n552\t\t\treturn\n553\t\t}\n554\t\n555\t\tnow := time.Now()\n556\t\n557\t\t// Build synthetic payload per spec:\n558\t\t// {trigger_id, trigger_name, condition, blob_id, person, position:{x,y,z}, zone, dwell_s, timestamp_ms}\n559\t\tpayload := map[string]interface{}{\n560\t\t\t\"trigger_id\":   trigger.ID,\n561\t\t\t\"trigger_name\": trigger.Name,\n562\t\t\t\"condition\":    trigger.Condition,\n563\t\t\t\"blob_id\":      0,\n564\t\t\t\"person\":       nil,\n565\t\t\t\"position\": map[string]float64{\"x\": 0, \"y\": 0, \"z\": 0},\n566\t\t\t\"zone\":         nil,\n567\t\t\t\"dwell_s\":      0,\n568\t\t\t\"timestamp_ms\":  now.UnixMilli(),\n569\t\t}\n570\t\n571\t\tdata, err := json.Marshal(payload)\n572\t\tif err != nil {\n573\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"failed to marshal test payload\", http.StatusInternalServerError)\n574\t\t\treturn\n575\t\t}\n576\t\n577\t\t// Execute each action and collect results\n578\t\tvar results []ActionResult\n579\t\ttotalStart := time.Now()\n580\t\n581\t\tfor _, action := range trigger.Actions {\n582\t\t\tresult := ActionResult{Type: action.Type}\n583\t\n584\t\t\tswitch action.Type {\n585\t\t\tcase \"webhook\":\n586\t\t\t\turl, ok := action.Params[\"url\"].(string)\n587\t\t\t\tif ok && url != \"\" {\n588\t\t\t\t\tresult.URL = url\n589\t\t\t\t\tstatusCode, latencyMs, err := h.doWebhookPost(url, data, action.Params)\n590\t\t\t\t\tresult.Status = statusCode\n591\t\t\t\t\tresult.ResponseMs = latencyMs\n592\t\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n593\t\t\t\t\t\tresult.Error = err.Error()\n594\t\t\t\t\t}\n595\t\t\t\t} else {\n596\t\t\t\t\tresult.Error = \"missing url\"\n597\t\t\t\t}\n598\t\n599\t\t\tcase \"mqtt\":\n600\t\t\t\tresult.URL, _ = action.Params[\"topic\"].(string)\n601\t\t\t\tif result.URL == \"\" {\n602\t\t\t\t\tresult.URL = \"(no topic)\"\n603\t\t\t\t}\n604\t\t\t\tresult.Error = \"test mode — mqtt not executed\"\n605\t\n606\t\t\tdefault:\n607\t\t\t\tresult.URL = \"(n/a)\"\n608\t\t\t\tresult.Error = \"test mode — action type not executable\"\n609\t\t\t}\n610\t\n611\t\t\tresults = append(results, result)\n612\t\t}\n613\t\n614\t\ttotalMs := time.Since(totalStart).Milliseconds()\n615\t\n616\t\tresp := WebhookTestResult{\n617\t\t\tStatus:    \"ok\",\n618\t\t\tResponseMs: totalMs,\n619\t\t\tActions:   results,\n620\t\t}\n621\t\n622\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusOK, resp)\n623\t}\n624\t\n625\t// enableTrigger handles POST /api/triggers/{id}/enable.\n626\t//\n627\t// Clears the error state (error_message and error_count) and re-enables the trigger.\n628\t//\n629\t// Response 200 (application/json): {\"status\": \"ok\"}\n630\t// Response 404: trigger not found.\n631\tfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) enableTrigger(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n632\t\tid := chi.URLParam(r, \"id\")\n633\t\n634\t\tif err := h.store.EnableTrigger(id); err != nil /api/triggers/{id}/disable.\n646\t//\n647\t// Disables a trigger. The trigger will no longer be evaluated until re-enabled.\n648\t//\n649\t// Response 200 (application/json): {\"status\": \"ok\"}\n650\t// Response 404: trigger not found.\n651\t// Response 500: to dashboard\n668\t\th.broadcastTriggerState(id)\n669\t\n670\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]interface{}{\"status\": \"ok\"})\n671\t}\n672\t\n673\t// getWebhookLog handles GET /api/triggers/{id}/webhook-log.\n674\t//\n675\t// Returns the most recent webhook firing log entries for a specific trigger.\n676\t// Entries include URL, timestamp, HTTP status code, latency, and any error message.\n677\t//\n678\t// Query parameters:\n679\t//   - limit: maximum entries to return (default 20, max 100)\n680\t//\n681\t// Response 200 (application/json): array of webhook log entries.\n682\tfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) getWebhookLog(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n683\t\tid := chi.URLParam(r, \"id\")\n684\t\n685\t\tlimitStr := r.URL.Query().Get(\"limit\")\n686\t\tlimit := 20\n687\t\tif limitStr != \"\" {\n688\t\t\tif l, err := strconv.Atoi(limitStr); err == nil && l > 0 && l <= 100 {\n689\t\t\t\tlimit = l\n690\t\t\t}\n691\t\t}\n692\t\n693\t\tentries := h.store.GetWebhookLog(id, limit)\n694\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusOK, entries)\n695\t}\n696\t\n697\t// getTriggerLog handles GET /api/triggers/log.\n698\t//\n699\t// Returns the most recent trigger firing events across all triggers.\n700\t//\n701\t// Query parameters:\n702\t//   - limit: maximum entries to return (default 10, max 100)\n703\t//\n704\t// Response 200 (application/json): array of firing records.\n705\tfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) getTriggerLog(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n706\t\t// Get limit from query param (default 10, max 100)\n707\t\tlimitStr := r.URL.Query().Get(\"limit\")\n708\t\tlimit := 10\n709\t\tif limitStr != \"\" {\n710\t\t\tif l, err := strconv.Atoi(limitStr); err == nil && l > 0 && l <= 100 {\n711\t\t\t\tlimit = l\n712\t\t\t}\n713\t\t}\n714\t\n715\t\trecords := h.store.GetRecentFirings(limit)\n716\t\n717\t\t// Convert to response format\n718\t\tresponse := make([]map[string]interface{}, 0, len(records))\n719\t\tfor _, r := range records {\n720\t\t\tresponse = append(response, map[string]interface{}{\n721\t\t\t\t\"trigger_id\": r.FiredAt.Format(time.RFC3339),\n725\t\t\t})\n726\t\t}\n727\t\n728\t\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusOK, response)\n729\t}\n730\t\n731\t// isValidShape validates that a shape has all required fields.\n732\tfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) isValidShape(shape *volume.ShapeJSON) bool {\n733\t\tswitch shape.Type {\n734\t\tcase volume.ShapeBox:\n735\t\t\treturn shape.X != nil && shape.Y != nil && shape.Z != nil &&\n736\t\t\t\tshape.W != nil && shape.D != nil && shape.H != nil &&\n737\t\t\t\t*shape.W > 0 && *shape.D > 0 && *shape.H > 0\n738\t\tcase volume.ShapeCylinder:\n739\t\t\treturn shape.CX != nil && shape.CY != nil && shape.Z != nil &&\n740\t\t\t\tshape.R != nil && shape.H != nil &&\n741\t\t\t\t*shape.R > 0 && *shape.H > 0\n742\t\tdefault:\n743\t\t\treturn false\n744\t\t}\n745\t}\n746\t\n747\t// toResponse converts a trigger to the API response format.\n748\tfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) toResponse(t *volume.Trigger, now time.Time) *TriggerResponse {\n749\t\tresp := &TriggerResponse{\n750\t\t\tID:             t.ID,\n751\t\t\tName:           t.Name,\n752\t\t\tShape:          t.Shape,\n753\t\t\tCondition:      t.Condition,\n754\t\t\tConditionParams: t.ConditionParams,\n755\t\t\tTimeConstraint: t.TimeConstraint,\n756\t\t\tActions:        t.Actions,\n757\t\t\tEnabled:        t.Enabled,\n758\t\t\tErrorMessage: t.UpdatedAt,\n763\t\t}\n764\t\n765\t\tif t.LastFired != nil {\n766\t\t\tresp.Elapsed = int(now.Sub(*t.LastFired).Seconds())\n767\t\t}\n768\t\n769\t\treturn resp\n770\t}\n771\t\n772\t// []string {\n775\t\treturn h.store.Evaluate(blobs, time.Now())\n776\t}\n777\t\n778\t// IsInVolume checks if a point is inside a trigger volume.\n779\tfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) IsInVolume(triggerID string, x, y, z float64) bool {\n780\t\treturn h.store.IsInVolume(triggerID, x, y, z)\n781\t}\n782\t\n783\t// onTriggerFired is called by the volume store when a trigger fires.\n784\tfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) onTriggerFired(event volume.FiredEvent) {\n785\t\tt := h.store.GetTrigger(event.TriggerID)\n786\t\tif t == nil {\n787\t\t\treturn\n788\t\t}\n789\t\n790\t\t// Execute all actions\n791\t\tfor _, action := range t.Actions {\n792\t\t\th.executeAction(action, event)\n793\t\t}\n794\t\n795\t\t// Broadcast trigger state to dashboard\n796\t\th.mu.RLock()\n797\t\tbroadcaster := h.wsBroadcaster\n798\t\th.mu.RUnlock()\n799\t\tif broadcaster != nil {\n800\t\t\tbroadcaster.BroadcastTriggerState(t.ID, t.Name, event.Timestamp, t.Enabled)\n801\t\t}\n802\t\n803\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Trigger fired: %s (%s, %d blob(s))\", t.Name, t.Condition, len(event.BlobIDs))\n804\t}\n805\t\n806\t// executeAction executes a single trigger action.\n807\tfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) executeAction(action volume.Action, event volume.FiredEvent) {\n808\t\tswitch action.Type {\n809\t\tcase \"webhook\":\n810\t\t\th.executeWebhook(action, event)\n811\t\tcase \"mqtt\":\n812\t\t\th.executeMQTT(action, event)\n813\t\tcase \"ntfy\", \"pushover\":\n814\t\t\th.executeNotification(action, event)\n815\t\t}\n816\t}\n817\t\n818\t// doWebhookPost sends an HTTP POST and returns status code, latency, error.\n819\t// This is the low-level webhook call shared by normal firing and test.\n820\tfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) doWebhookPost(url string, data []byte, params map[string]interface{}) (statusCode int, latencyMs int64, err error) {\n821\t\treq, err := http.NewRequest(\"POST\", url, bytes.NewReader(data))\n822\t\tif err != nil {\n823\t\t\treturn 0, 0, fmt.Errorf(\"create request: %w\", err)\n824\t\t}\n825\t\n826\t\treq.Header.Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json\")\n827\t\n828\t\t// Add custom headers from action params\n829\t\tfor k, v := range params {\n830\t\t\tif k != \"url\" {\n831\t\t\t\tif headerStr, ok := v.(string); ok {\n832\t\t\t\t\treq.Header.Set(k, headerStr)\n833\t\t\t\t}\n834\t\t\t}\n835\t\t}\n836\t\n837\t\tstart := time.Now()\n838\t\tresp, err := h.httpClient.Do(req)\n839\t\tlatencyMs = time.Since(start).Milliseconds()\n840\t\n841\t\tif err != nil {\n842\t\t\treturn 0, latencyMs, fmt.Errorf(\"request failed: %w\", err)\n843\t\t}\n844\t\tdefer resp.Body.Close()\n845\t\t// Drain body to allow connection reuse\n846\t\tio.Copy(io.Discard, resp.Body)\n847\t\n848\t\treturn resp.StatusCode, latencyMs, nil\n849\t}\n850\t\n851\t// executeWebhook sends an HTTP POST to a webhook URL with fault tolerance.\n852\t// - 4xx: disable trigger, set error_message, push WS alert, log webhook_log\n853\t// - 5xx / timeout: log warning, increment error_count, do NOT disable\n854\t// - 2xx: reset error_count, log webhook_log\n855\tfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) executeWebhook(action volume.Action, event volume.FiredEvent) {\n856\t\turl, ok := action.Params[\"url\"].(string)\n857\t\tif !ok || url == \"\" {\n858\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Webhook action missing URL\")\n859\t\t\treturn\n860\t\t}\n861\t\n862\t\t// Build payload per spec:\n863\t\t// {trigger_id, trigger_name, condition, blob_id, person, position:{x,y,z}, zone, dwell_s, timestamp_ms}\n864\t\tt := h.store.GetTrigger(event.TriggerID)\n865\t\tpayload := map[string]interface{}{\n866\t\t\t\"trigger_id\":   event.TriggerID,\n867\t\t\t\"trigger_name\":  t.Name,\n868\t\t\t\"condition\":    t.Condition,\n869\t\t\t\"blob_id\":      0,\n870\t\t\t\"person\":       nil,\n871\t\t\t\"position\":     map[string]float64{\"x\": 0, \"y\": 0, \"z\": 0},\n872\t\t\t\"zone\":         nil,\n873\t\t\t\"dwell_s\":      0,\n874\t\t\t\"timestamp_ms\":  event.Timestamp.UnixMilli(),\n875\t\t}\n876\t\n877\t\tdata, err := json.Marshal(payload)\n878\t\tif err != nil {\n879\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Failed to marshal webhook payload: %v\", err)\n880\t\t\treturn\n881\t\t}\n882\t\n883\t\tstatusCode, latencyMs, reqErr := h.doWebhookPost(url, data, action.Params)\n884\t\tfiredAtMs := event.Timestamp.UnixMilli()\n885\t\n886\t\t// Log the attempt\n887\t\tlogErr := \"\"\n888\t\tif reqErr != nil {\n889\t\t\tlogErr = reqErr.Error()\n890\t\t}\n891\t\th.store.WriteWebhookLog(event.TriggerID, url, firedAtMs, statusCode, latencyMs, logErr)\n892\t\n893\t\t// Error handling based on response class\n894\t\tif reqErr != nil {\n895\t\t\t// Timeout or network error — treat as 5xx-equivalent\n896\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Webhook request failed for trigger %q: %v\", t.Name, reqErr)\n897\t\t\th.store.IncrementErrorCount(event.TriggerID)\n898\t\t\treturn\n899\t\t}\n900\t\n901\t\tif statusCode >= 400 && statusCode < 500 {\n902\t\t\t// 4xx — client error, likely misconfigured URL\n903\t\t\terrMsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"Webhook returned HTTP %d — trigger disabled. Fix the URL and re-enable.\", statusCode)\n904\t\t\th.store.DisableTriggerWithError(event.TriggerID, errMsg)\n905\t\n906\t\t\t// Push WS alert to dashboard\n907\t\t\th.mu.RLock()\n908\t\t\tbroadcaster := h.wsBroadcaster\n909\t\t\th.mu.RUnlock()\n910\t\t\tif broadcaster != nil {\n911\t\t\t\tbroadcaster.BroadcastAlert(\"trigger_disabled\", time.Now(), \"warning\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Trigger %q disabled: webhook returned HTTP %d\", t.Name, statusCode), false)\n912\t\t\t}\n913\t\t\treturn\n914\t\t}\n915\t\n916\t\tif statusCode >= 500 {\n917\t\t\t// 5xx — server error, transient\n918\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Webhook returned HTTP %d for trigger %q (server error, not disabling)\", statusCode, t.Name)\n919\t\t\th.store.IncrementErrorCount(event.TriggerID)\n920\t\t\treturn\n921\t\t}\n922\t\n923\t\t// 2xx — success, reset error count\n924\t\th.store.ResetErrorCount(event.TriggerID)\n925\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Webhook delivered for trigger %q (HTTP %d, %dms)\", t.Name, statusCode, latencyMs)\n926\t}\n927\t\n928\t// executeMQTT publishes to an MQTT topic.\n929\tfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) executeMQTT(action volume.Action, event volume.FiredEvent) {\n930\t\th.mu.RLock()\n931\t\tclient := {\n940\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] MQTT client not connected\")\n941\t\t\treturn\n942\t\t}\n943\t\n944\t\ttopic, ok := action.Params[\"topic\"].(string)\n945\t\tif !ok || topic == \"\" Failed to marshal MQTT payload: %v\", err)\n962\t\t\treturn\n963\t\t}\n964\t\n965\t\tif err := client.Publish(topic, data); err != nil {\n966\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] MQTT publish failed: %v\", err)\n967\t\t}\n968\t}\n969\t\n970\t// executeNotification sends a push notification.\n971\tfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) executeNotification(action volume.Action, event volume.FiredEvent) Package api provides REST API handlers for Spaxel automation trigger volumes.\n// This handler replaces the previous triggers.go implementation with\n// proper shape_json-based volume geometry and state machine support.\npackage api\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"io\"\n\t\"log\"\n\t\"net/http\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"sync\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/spaxel/mothership/internal/volume\"\n\n\t\"github.com/go-chi/chi/v5\"\n)\n\n// VolumeMQTTClient interface for MQTT publishing.\ntype VolumeMQTTClient interface {\n\tPublish(topic string, payload []byte) error\n\tIsConnected() bool\n}\n\n// NotificationClient interface for sending notifications.\ntype NotificationClient interface {\n\tSendViaChannel(channelType string, title, body string, data map[string]interface{}) error\n}\n\n// WSBroadcaster sends messages to dashboard WebSocket clients.\ntype WSBroadcaster interface {\n\tBroadcastAlert(alertID string, timestamp time.Time, severity, description string, acknowledged bool)\n\tBroadcastTriggerState(triggerID, name string, lastFired time.Time, enabled bool)\n}\n\n// VolumeTriggersHandler manages automation trigger volumes with 3D geometry.\ntype VolumeTriggersHandler struct {\n\tmu          sync.RWMutex\n\tstore       *volume.Store\n\thttpClient  *http.Client\n\tmqttClient   VolumeMQTTClient\n\tnotifyClient NotificationClient\n\twsBroadcaster WSBroadcaster\n}\n\n// TriggerResponse represents a trigger as returned by the API.\n//\n// JSON fields:\n//   - id: integer trigger ID (auto-assigned)\n//   - name: user-defined trigger name\n//   - shape: 3D volume geometry (box or cylinder)\n//   - condition: trigger condition (enter, leave, dwell, vacant, count)\n//   - condition_params: condition-specific parameters (duration_s, count_threshold, person)\n//   - time_constraint: optional time window (from, to in HH:MM format)\n//   - actions: list of actions to execute when triggered (webhook, mqtt, ntfy, pushover)\n//   - enabled: whether the trigger is active\n//   - error_message: last error description (set by 4xx webhook responses)\n//   - error_count: consecutive error count (reset on 2xx success)\n//   - last_fired: timestamp of last firing (omitted if never fired)\n//   - elapsed: seconds since last fire (computed at response time)\n//   - created_at: creation timestamp\n//   - updated_at: last modification timestamp\ntype TriggerResponse struct {\n\tID             string                  `json:\"id\"`\n\tName           string                  `json:\"name\"`\n\tShape          volume.ShapeJSON        `json:\"shape\"`\n\tCondition      string                  `json:\"condition\"`\n\tConditionParams volume.ConditionParams `json:\"condition_params\"`\n\tTimeConstraint *volume.TimeConstraint `json:\"time_constraint,omitempty\"`\n\tActions        []volume.Action         `json:\"actions\"`\n\tEnabled        bool                    `json:\"enabled\"`\n\tErrorMessage  string                  `json:\"error_message,omitempty\"`\n\tErrorCount     int                     `json:\"error_count\"`\n\tLastFired      *time.Time              `json:\"last_fired,omitempty\"`\n\tElapsed        int                     `json:\"elapsed,omitempty\"` // seconds since last fire\n\tCreatedAt      time.Time               `json:\"created_at\"`\n\tUpdatedAt      time.Time               `json:\"updated_at\"`\n}\n\n// WebhookTestResult is returned by POST /api/triggers/{id}/test.\n//\n// Contains the overall test status and per-action execution results.\ntype WebhookTestResult struct {\n\tStatus    string        `json:\"status\"`\n\tResponseMs int64         `json:\"response_ms\"`\n\tError     string        `json:\"error,omitempty\"`\n\tActions   []ActionResult `json:\"actions\"`\n}\n\n// ActionResult represents the outcome of executing a single action during a test fire.\ntype ActionResult struct {\n\tType      string `json:\"type\"`\n\tURL       string `json:\"url,omitempty\"`\n\tStatus    int    `json:\"status,omitempty\"`\n\tResponseMs int64  `json:\"response_ms,omitempty\"`\n\tError     string `json:\"error,omitempty\"`\n}\n\n// NewVolumeTriggersHandler creates a new triggers handler with volume support.\nfunc NewVolumeTriggersHandler(dbPath string) (*VolumeTriggersHandler, error) {\n\tstore, err := volume.NewStore(dbPath)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\th := &VolumeTriggersHandler{\n\t\tstore: store,\n\t\thttpClient: &http.Client{\n\t\t\tTimeout: 5 * time.Second,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\t// Set up firing callback\n\tstore.SetOnFired(h.onTriggerFired)\n\n\treturn h, nil\n}\n\n// SetVolumeMQTTClient sets the MQTT client for action execution.\nfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) SetVolumeMQTTClient(client VolumeMQTTClient) {\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\tdefer h.mu.Unlock()\n\th.mqttClient = client\n}\n\n// SetNotificationClient sets the notification client for action execution.\nfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) SetNotificationClient(client NotificationClient) {\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\tdefer h.mu.Unlock()\n\th.notifyClient = client\n}\n\n// SetWSBroadcaster sets the WebSocket broadcaster for dashboard alerts.\nfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) SetWSBroadcaster(broadcaster WSBroadcaster) {\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\tdefer h.mu.Unlock()\n\th.wsBroadcaster = broadcaster\n}\n\n// Close closes the underlying store.\nfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) Close() error {\n\treturn h.store.Close()\n}\n\n// RegisterRoutes registers volume trigger endpoints on the given router.\n//\n// Triggers:\n//\n//\tGET /api/triggers\n//\n//\t@Summary\t\tList all triggers\n//\t\t@Description\tReturns all automation triggers with 3D volume geometry, conditions, actions, enabled state, and elapsed time since last fire.\n//\t\t@Tags\t\t\ttriggers\n//\t\t@Produce\t\tjson\n//\t@Success\t\t200\t{array}\t\tTriggerResponse\t\"List of triggers\"\n//\t@Router\t\t\t/api/triggers [get]\n//\n//\tPOST /api/triggers\n//\n//\t@Summary\t\tCreate a trigger\n//\t\t@Description\tCreates a new automation trigger with 3D volume geometry. The request body must include name, shape, and condition. Actions default to an empty array if omitted. Enabled defaults to true.\n//\t\t@Tags\t\t\ttriggers\n//\t\t@Accept\t\t\tjson\n//\t\t@Produce\t\tjson\n//\t@Param\t\t\ttrigger\tbody\t\tvolumeCreateTriggerRequest\ttrue\t\"Trigger definition\"\n//\t\t@Success\t\t201\t\t{object}\tTriggerResponse\t\"Created trigger\"\n//\t\t@Failure\t\t400\t{object}\tmap[string]string\t\"Invalid request body, missing required fields, or invalid shape/condition\"\n//\t\t@Failure\t\t500\t{object}\tmap[string]string\t\"Database error\"\n//\t\t@Router\t\t\t/api/triggers [post]\n//\n//\tGET /api/triggers/{id}\n//\n//\t@Summary\t\tGet a trigger\n//\t\t@Description\tReturns a single trigger by its ID.\n//\t\t@Tags\t\t\ttriggers\n//\t\t@Produce\t\tjson\n//\t\t@Param\t\t\tid\tpath\t\tstring\ttrue\t\"Trigger ID\"\n//\t\t@Success\t\t200\t{object}\tTriggerResponse\t\"Trigger object\"\n//\t\t@Failure\t\t404\t{object}\tmap[string]string\t\"Trigger not found\"\n//\t\t@Router\t\t\t/api/triggers/{id} [get]\n//\n//\tPUT /api/triggers/{id}\n//\n//\t@Summary\t\tUpdate a trigger\n//\t\t@Description\tUpdates an existing trigger. Only fields present in the request body are modified; omitted fields retain their current values. Shape geometry is validated on update.\n//\t\t@Tags\t\t\ttriggers\n//\t\t@Accept\t\t\tjson\n//\t\t@Produce\t\tjson\n//\t\t@Param\t\t\tid\t\tpath\t\tstring\t\ttrue\t\"Trigger ID\"\n//\t\t@Param\t\t\ttrigger\tbody\t\tvolumeUpdateTriggerRequest\ttrue\t\"Partial trigger object with fields to update\"\n//\t\t@Success\t\t200\t{object}\tTriggerResponse\t\"Updated trigger\"\n//\t\t@Failure\t\t400\t{object}\tmap[string]string\t\"Invalid request body or invalid shape geometry\"\n//\t\t@Failure\t\t404\t{object}\tmap[string]string\t\"Trigger not found\"\n//\t\t@Failure\t\t500\t{object}\tmap[string]string\t\"Database error\"\n//\t\t@Router\t\t\t/api/triggers/{id} [put]\n//\n//\tDELETE /api/triggers/{id}\n//\n//\t@Summary\t\tDelete a trigger\n//\t\t@Description\tRemoves a trigger by ID and all associated state (trigger state, webhook log entries).\n//\t\t@Tags\t\t\ttriggers\n//\t\t@Param\t\t\tid\tpath\t\tstring\ttrue\t\"Trigger ID\"\n//\t\t@Success\t\t204\t\"Trigger deleted\"\n//\t\t@Failure\t\t500\t{object}\tmap[string]string\t\"Database error\"\n//\t\t@Router\t\t\t/api/triggers/{id} [delete]\n//\n//\tPOST /api/triggers/{id}/test\n//\n//\t@Summary\t\tTest-fire a trigger\n//\t\t@Description\tFires the trigger's actions once with a synthetic event payload for testing. Webhook actions are executed immediately; MQTT and notification actions are reported as simulated. Test firings do NOT update last_fired, do NOT increment error counts, and do NOT disable the trigger on 4xx responses.\n//\t\t@Tags\t\t\ttriggers\n//\t\t@Produce\t\tjson\n//\t\t@Param\t\t\tid\tpath\t\tstring\ttrue\t\"Trigger ID\"\n//\t\t@Success\t\t200\t{object}\tWebhookTestResult\t\"Test fire results with per-action status\"\n//\t\t@Failure\t\t404\t{object}\tmap[string]string\t\"Trigger not found\"\n//\t\t@Failure\t\t500\t{object}\tmap[string]string\t\"Failed to marshal test payload\"\n//\t\t@Router\t\t\t/api/triggers/{id}/test [post]\n//\n//\tPOST /api/triggers/{id}/enable\n//\n//\t@Summary\t\tEnable a trigger\n//\t\t@Description\tClears the error state (error_message and error_count) and re-enables the trigger.\n//\t\t@Tags\t\t\ttriggers\n//\t\t@Produce\t\tjson\n//\t\t@Param\t\t\tid\tpath\t\tstring\ttrue\t\"Trigger ID\"\n//\t\t@Success\t\t200\t{object}\tmap[string]string\t\"ok\"\n//\t\t@Failure\t\t404\t{object}\tmap[string]string\t\"Trigger not found\"\n//\t\t@Router\t\t\t/api/triggers/{id}/enable [post]\n//\n//\tPOST /api/triggers/{id}/disable\n//\n//\t@Summary\t\tDisable a trigger\n//\t\t@Description\tDisables a trigger. The trigger will no longer be evaluated until re-enabled.\n//\t\t@Tags\t\t\ttriggers\n//\t\t@Produce\t\tjson\n//\t\t@Param\t\t\tid\tpath\t\tstring\ttrue\t\"Trigger ID\"\n//\t\t@Success\t\t200\t{object}\tmap[string]string\t\"ok\"\n//\t\t@Failure\t\t404\t{object}\tmap[string]string\t\"Trigger not found\"\n//\t\t@Failure\t\t500\t{object}\tmap[string]string\t\"Database error\"\n//\t\t@Router\t\t\t/api/triggers/{id}/disable [post]\n//\n//\tGET /api/triggers/{id}/webhook-log\n//\n//\t@Summary\t\tWebhook firing log for a trigger\n//\t\t@Description\tReturns the most recent webhook firing log entries for a specific trigger. Entries include URL, timestamp, HTTP status code, latency, and any error message.\n//\t\t@Tags\t\t\ttriggers\n//\t\t@Produce\t\tjson\n//\t\t@Param\t\t\tid\t\tpath\t\tstring\ttrue\t\"Trigger ID\"\n//\t\t@Param\t\t\tlimit\tquery\t\tint\t\tfalse\t\"Max entries to return (default 20, max 100)\"\n//\t\t@Success\t\t200\t{array}\t\tvolume.WebhookLogEntry\t\"Webhook log entries\"\n//\t\t@Router\t\t\t/api/triggers/{id}/webhook-log [get]\n//\n//\tGET /api/triggers/log\n//\n//\t@Summary\t\tRecent trigger firing log\n//\t\t@Description\tReturns the most recent trigger firing events across all triggers.\n//\t\t@Tags\t\t\ttriggers\n//\t\t@Produce\t\tjson\n//\t\t@Param\t\t\tlimit\tquery\t\tint\t\tfalse\t\"Max entries to return (default 10, max 100)\"\n//\t\t@Success\t\t200\t{array}\t\tmap[string]interface{}\t\"Firing records\"\n//\t\t@Router\t\t\t/api/triggers/log [get]\nfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) RegisterRoutes(r chi.Router) {\n\tr.Get(\"/api/triggers\", h.listTriggers)\n\tr.Post(\"/api/triggers\", h.createTrigger)\n\tr.Get(\"/api/triggers/{id}\", h.getTrigger)\n\tr.Put(\"/api/triggers/{id}\", h.updateTrigger)\n\tr.Delete(\"/api/triggers/{id}\", h.deleteTrigger)\n\tr.Post(\"/api/triggers/{id}/test\", h.testTrigger)\n\tr.Post(\"/api/triggers/{id}/enable\", h.enableTrigger)\n\tr.Post(\"/api/triggers/{id}/disable\", h.disableTrigger)\n\tr.Get(\"/api/triggers/{id}/webhook-log\", h.getWebhookLog)\n\tr.Get(\"/api/triggers/log\", h.getTriggerLog)\n}\n\n// listTriggers handles GET /api/triggers.\n//\n// Returns all registered automation triggers as a JSON array. Each trigger\n// includes its 3D shape geometry, condition, actions, enabled state, and\n// elapsed time since last fire.\n//\n// Response 200 (application/json):\n//\n//\t[{\n//\t  \"id\": \"1\",\n//\t  \"name\": \"Couch Dwell\",\n//\t  \"shape\": {\"type\": \"box\", \"x\": 1, \"y\": 2, \"z\": 0, \"w\": 1, \"d\": 1, \"h\": 1.5},\n//\t  \"condition\": \"dwell\",\n//\t  \"condition_params\": {\"duration_s\": 30},\n//\t  \"time_constraint\": {\"from\": \"22:00\", \"to\": \"06:00\"},\n//\t  \"actions\": [{\"type\": \"webhook\", \"url\": \"http://example.com/hook\"}],\n//\t  \"enabled\": true,\n//\t  \"last_fired\": \"2024-03-15T14:32:05Z\",\n//\t  \"elapsed\": 142,\n//\t  \"created_at\": \"2024-03-10T08:00:00Z\",\n//\t  \"updated_at\": \"2024-03-10T08:00:00Z\"\n//\t}]\nfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) listTriggers(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\ttriggers := h.store.GetAll()\n\n\tresponse := make([]*TriggerResponse, 0, len(triggers))\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\n\tfor _, t := range triggers {\n\t\tresp := h.toResponse(t, now)\n\t\tresponse = append(response, resp)\n\t}\n\n\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusOK, response)\n}\n\n// getTrigger handles GET /api/triggers/{id}.\n//\n// Returns a single trigger by its integer ID.\n//\n// Response 200 (application/json): the trigger object.\n// Response 404: trigger not found.\nfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) getTrigger(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tid := chi.URLParam(r, \"id\")\n\n\ttrigger, err := h.store.Get(id)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\thttp.Error(w, \"trigger not found\", http.StatusNotFound)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tresp := h.toResponse(trigger, time.Now())\n\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusOK, resp)\n}\n\n// volumeCreateTriggerRequest is the request body for POST /api/triggers.\ntype volumeCreateTriggerRequest struct {\n\tName            string                   `json:\"name\"`\n\tShape           volume.ShapeJSON         `json:\"shape\"`\n\tCondition       string                   `json:\"condition\"`\n\tConditionParams volume.ConditionParams `json:\"condition_params,omitempty\"`\n\tTimeConstraint  *volume.TimeConstraint   `json:\"time_constraint,omitempty\"`\n\tActions         []volume.Action          `json:\"actions\"`\n\tEnabled         *bool                    `json:\"enabled,omitempty\"`\n}\n\n// createTrigger handles POST /api/triggers.\n//\n// Creates a new automation trigger with 3D volume geometry. The request body\n// must include name, shape, and condition. Actions default to an empty array\n// if omitted. Enabled defaults to true.\n//\n// Request body (application/json):\n//\n//\t{\n//\t  \"name\": \"Couch Dwell\",\n//\t  \"shape\": {\"type\": \"box\", \"x\": 1, \"y\": 2, \"z\": 0, \"w\": 1, \"d\": 1, \"h\": 1.5},\n//\t  \"condition\": \"dwell\",\n//\t  \"condition_params\": {\"duration_s\": 30},\n//\t  \"time_constraint\": {\"from\": \"22:00\", \"to\": \"06:00\"},\n//\t  \"actions\": [{\"type\": \"webhook\", \"url\": \"http://example.com/hook\"}],\n//\t  \"enabled\": true\n//\t}\n//\n// Response 201 (application/json): the created trigger object.\n// Response 400: missing required fields, invalid shape geometry, or invalid condition value.\n// Response 500: database error.\nfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) createTrigger(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tvar req volumeCreateTriggerRequest\n\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {\n\t\thttp.Error(w, \"invalid request body\", http.StatusBadRequest)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tif req.Name == \"\" {\n\t\thttp.Error(w, \"name is required\", http.StatusBadRequest)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Validate shape\n\tif !h.isValidShape(&req.Shape) {\n\t\thttp.Error(w, \"invalid shape geometry\", http.StatusBadRequest)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Validate condition\n\tvalidConditions := map[string]bool{\n\t\t\"enter\":  true,\n\t\t\"leave\":  true,\n\t\t\"dwell\":  true,\n\t\t\"vacant\": true,\n\t\t\"count\":  true,\n\t}\n\tif !validConditions[req.Condition] {\n\t\thttp.Error(w, \"condition must be one of: enter, leave, dwell, vacant, count\", http.StatusBadRequest)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Set default enabled if not specified\n\tenabled := true\n\tif req.Enabled != nil {\n\t\tenabled = *req.Enabled\n\t}\n\n\ttrigger := &volume.Trigger{\n\t\tName:            req.Name,\n\t\tShape:           req.Shape,\n\t\tCondition:       req.Condition,\n\t\tConditionParams: req.ConditionParams,\n\t\tTimeConstraint:  req.TimeConstraint,\n\t\tActions:         req.Actions,\n\t\tEnabled:         enabled,\n\t}\n\n\tid, err := h.store.Create(trigger)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\thttp.Error(w, \"failed to create trigger\", http.StatusInternalServerError)\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[ERROR] Failed to create trigger: %v\", err)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Fetch the created trigger to get the full object\n\tcreated, err := h.store.Get(id)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\thttp.Error(w, \"failed to retrieve created trigger\", http.StatusInternalServerError)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tresp := h.toResponse(created, time.Now())\n\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusCreated, resp)\n}\n\n// volumeUpdateTriggerRequest is the request body for PUT /api/triggers/{id}.\n// Only non-nil fields are updated.\ntype volumeUpdateTriggerRequest struct {\n\tName            *string                  `json:\"name,omitempty\"`\n\tShape           *volume.ShapeJSON        `json:\"shape,omitempty\"`\n\tCondition       *string                  `json:\"condition,omitempty\"`\n\tConditionParams *volume.ConditionParams `json:\"condition_params,omitempty\"`\n\tTimeConstraint  *volume.TimeConstraint   `json:\"time_constraint,omitempty\"`\n\tActions         *[]volume.Action         `json:\"actions,omitempty\"`\n\tEnabled         *bool                    `json:\"enabled,omitempty\"`\n}\n\n// updateTrigger handles PUT /api/triggers/{id}.\n//\n// Updates an existing trigger. Only fields present in the request body are\n// modified; omitted fields retain their current values. Shape geometry is\n// validated on update.\n//\n// Request body (application/json): partial trigger object with fields to update.\n//\n// Response 200 (application/json): the updated trigger object.\n// Response 400: invalid request body or invalid shape geometry.\n// Response 404: trigger not found.\n// Response 500: database error.\nfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) updateTrigger(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tid := chi.URLParam(r, \"id\")\n\n\ttrigger, err := h.store.Get(id)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\thttp.Error(w, \"trigger not found\", http.StatusNotFound)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tvar req volumeUpdateTriggerRequest\n\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {\n\t\thttp.Error(w, \"invalid request body\", http.StatusBadRequest)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Apply updates\n\tif req.Name != nil {\n\t\ttrigger.Name = *req.Name\n\t}\n\tif req.Shape != nil {\n\t\tif !h.isValidShape(req.Shape) {\n\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"invalid shape geometry\", http.StatusBadRequest)\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\t\ttrigger.Shape = *req.Shape\n\t}\n\tif req.Condition != nil {\n\t\ttrigger.Condition = *req.Condition\n\t}\n\tif req.ConditionParams != nil {\n\t\ttrigger.ConditionParams = *req.ConditionParams\n\t}\n\tif req.TimeConstraint != nil {\n\t\ttrigger.TimeConstraint = req.TimeConstraint\n\t}\n\tif req.Actions != nil {\n\t\ttrigger.Actions = *req.Actions\n\t}\n\tif req.Enabled != nil {\n\t\ttrigger.Enabled = *req.Enabled\n\t}\n\n\tif err := h.store.Update(trigger); err != nil {\n\t\thttp.Error(w, \"failed to update trigger\", http.StatusInternalServerError)\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[ERROR] Failed to update trigger: %v\", err)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tresp := h.toResponse(trigger, time.Now())\n\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusOK, resp)\n}\n\n// deleteTrigger handles DELETE /api/triggers/{id}.\n//\n// Removes a trigger by ID and all associated state (trigger state, webhook log entries).\n//\n// Response 204: trigger deleted.\n// Response 500: database error.\nfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) deleteTrigger(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tid := chi.URLParam(r, \"id\")\n\n\tif err := h.store.Delete(id); err != nil {\n\t\thttp.Error(w, \"failed to delete trigger\", http.StatusInternalServerError)\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[ERROR] Failed to delete trigger: %v\", err)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusNoContent)\n}\n\n// testTrigger handles POST /api/triggers/{id}/test.\n//\n// Fires the trigger's actions once with a synthetic event payload for testing.\n// Webhook actions are executed immediately; MQTT and notification actions are\n// reported as simulated (not executed). Test firings do NOT update last_fired,\n// do NOT increment error counts, and do NOT disable the trigger on 4xx responses.\n//\n// Response 200 (application/json):\n//\n//\t{\n//\t  \"status\": \"ok\",\n//\t  \"response_ms\": 42,\n//\t  \"actions\": [{\n//\t    \"type\": \"webhook\",\n//\t    \"url\": \"http://example.com/hook\",\n//\t    \"status\": 200,\n//\t    \"response_ms\": 42\n//\t  }]\n//\t}\n//\n// Response 404: trigger not found.\n// Response 500: failed to marshal test payload.\nfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) testTrigger(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tid := chi.URLParam(r, \"id\")\n\n\ttrigger, err := h.store.Get(id)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\thttp.Error(w, \"trigger not found\", http.StatusNotFound)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\n\t// Build synthetic payload per spec:\n\t// {trigger_id, trigger_name, condition, blob_id, person, position:{x,y,z}, zone, dwell_s, timestamp_ms}\n\tpayload := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"trigger_id\":   trigger.ID,\n\t\t\"trigger_name\": trigger.Name,\n\t\t\"condition\":    trigger.Condition,\n\t\t\"blob_id\":      0,\n\t\t\"person\":       nil,\n\t\t\"position\": map[string]float64{\"x\": 0, \"y\": 0, \"z\": 0},\n\t\t\"zone\":         nil,\n\t\t\"dwell_s\":      0,\n\t\t\"timestamp_ms\":  now.UnixMilli(),\n\t}\n\n\tdata, err := json.Marshal(payload)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\thttp.Error(w, \"failed to marshal test payload\", http.StatusInternalServerError)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Execute each action and collect results\n\tvar results []ActionResult\n\ttotalStart := time.Now()\n\n\tfor _, action := range trigger.Actions {\n\t\tresult := ActionResult{Type: action.Type}\n\n\t\tswitch action.Type {\n\t\tcase \"webhook\":\n\t\t\turl, ok := action.Params[\"url\"].(string)\n\t\t\tif ok && url != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tresult.URL = url\n\t\t\t\tstatusCode, latencyMs, err := h.doWebhookPost(url, data, action.Params)\n\t\t\t\tresult.Status = statusCode\n\t\t\t\tresult.ResponseMs = latencyMs\n\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tresult.Error = err.Error()\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tresult.Error = \"missing url\"\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\tcase \"mqtt\":\n\t\t\tresult.URL, _ = action.Params[\"topic\"].(string)\n\t\t\tif result.URL == \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tresult.URL = \"(no topic)\"\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tresult.Error = \"test mode — mqtt not executed\"\n\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\tresult.URL = \"(n/a)\"\n\t\t\tresult.Error = \"test mode — action type not executable\"\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tresults = append(results, result)\n\t}\n\n\ttotalMs := time.Since(totalStart).Milliseconds()\n\n\tresp := WebhookTestResult{\n\t\tStatus:    \"ok\",\n\t\tResponseMs: totalMs,\n\t\tActions:   results,\n\t}\n\n\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusOK, resp)\n}\n\n// enableTrigger handles POST /api/triggers/{id}/enable.\n//\n// Clears the error state (error_message and error_count) and re-enables the trigger.\n//\n// Response 200 (application/json): {\"status\": \"ok\"}\n// Response 404: trigger not found.\nfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) enableTrigger(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tid := chi.URLParam(r, \"id\")\n\n\tif err := h.store.EnableTrigger(id); err != nil {\n\t\thttp.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusNotFound)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Broadcast updated trigger state to dashboard\n\th.broadcastTriggerState(id)\n\n\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]interface{}{\"status\": \"ok\"})\n}\n\n// disableTrigger handles POST /api/triggers/{id}/disable.\n//\n// Disables a trigger. The trigger will no longer be evaluated until re-enabled.\n//\n// Response 200 (application/json): {\"status\": \"ok\"}\n// Response 404: trigger not found.\n// Response 500: database error.\nfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) disableTrigger(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tid := chi.URLParam(r, \"id\")\n\n\ttrigger, err := h.store.Get(id)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\thttp.Error(w, \"trigger not found\", http.StatusNotFound)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\ttrigger.Enabled = false\n\tif err := h.store.Update(trigger); err != nil {\n\t\thttp.Error(w, \"failed to update trigger\", http.StatusInternalServerError)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Broadcast updated trigger state to dashboard\n\th.broadcastTriggerState(id)\n\n\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]interface{}{\"status\": \"ok\"})\n}\n\n// getWebhookLog handles GET /api/triggers/{id}/webhook-log.\n//\n// Returns the most recent webhook firing log entries for a specific trigger.\n// Entries include URL, timestamp, HTTP status code, latency, and any error message.\n//\n// Query parameters:\n//   - limit: maximum entries to return (default 20, max 100)\n//\n// Response 200 (application/json): array of webhook log entries.\nfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) getWebhookLog(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tid := chi.URLParam(r, \"id\")\n\n\tlimitStr := r.URL.Query().Get(\"limit\")\n\tlimit := 20\n\tif limitStr != \"\" {\n\t\tif l, err := strconv.Atoi(limitStr); err == nil && l > 0 && l <= 100 {\n\t\t\tlimit = l\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tentries := h.store.GetWebhookLog(id, limit)\n\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusOK, entries)\n}\n\n// getTriggerLog handles GET /api/triggers/log.\n//\n// Returns the most recent trigger firing events across all triggers.\n//\n// Query parameters:\n//   - limit: maximum entries to return (default 10, max 100)\n//\n// Response 200 (application/json): array of firing records.\nfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) getTriggerLog(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\t// Get limit from query param (default 10, max 100)\n\tlimitStr := r.URL.Query().Get(\"limit\")\n\tlimit := 10\n\tif limitStr != \"\" {\n\t\tif l, err := strconv.Atoi(limitStr); err == nil && l > 0 && l <= 100 {\n\t\t\tlimit = l\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\trecords := h.store.GetRecentFirings(limit)\n\n\t// Convert to response format\n\tresponse := make([]map[string]interface{}, 0, len(records))\n\tfor _, r := range records {\n\t\tresponse = append(response, map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\t\"trigger_id\":   r.TriggerID,\n\t\t\t\"trigger_name\": r.TriggerName,\n\t\t\t\"condition\":    r.Condition,\n\t\t\t\"fired_at\":     r.FiredAt.Format(time.RFC3339),\n\t\t})\n\t}\n\n\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusOK, response)\n}\n\n// isValidShape validates that a shape has all required fields.\nfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) isValidShape(shape *volume.ShapeJSON) bool {\n\tswitch shape.Type {\n\tcase volume.ShapeBox:\n\t\treturn shape.X != nil && shape.Y != nil && shape.Z != nil &&\n\t\t\tshape.W != nil && shape.D != nil && shape.H != nil &&\n\t\t\t*shape.W > 0 && *shape.D > 0 && *shape.H > 0\n\tcase volume.ShapeCylinder:\n\t\treturn shape.CX != nil && shape.CY != nil && shape.Z != nil &&\n\t\t\tshape.R != nil && shape.H != nil &&\n\t\t\t*shape.R > 0 && *shape.H > 0\n\tdefault:\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n}\n\n// toResponse converts a trigger to the API response format.\nfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) toResponse(t *volume.Trigger, now time.Time) *TriggerResponse {\n\tresp := &TriggerResponse{\n\t\tID:             t.ID,\n\t\tName:           t.Name,\n\t\tShape:          t.Shape,\n\t\tCondition:      t.Condition,\n\t\tConditionParams: t.ConditionParams,\n\t\tTimeConstraint: t.TimeConstraint,\n\t\tActions:        t.Actions,\n\t\tEnabled:        t.Enabled,\n\t\tErrorMessage:  t.ErrorMessage,\n\t\tErrorCount:     t.ErrorCount,\n\t\tLastFired:      t.LastFired,\n\t\tCreatedAt:      t.CreatedAt,\n\t\tUpdatedAt:      t.UpdatedAt,\n\t}\n\n\tif t.LastFired != nil {\n\t\tresp.Elapsed = int(now.Sub(*t.LastFired).Seconds())\n\t}\n\n\treturn resp\n}\n\n// EvaluateTriggers is called by the fusion engine to evaluate triggers.\n// Returns a list of trigger IDs that fired.\nfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) EvaluateTriggers(blobs []volume.BlobPos) []string {\n\treturn h.store.Evaluate(blobs, time.Now())\n}\n\n// IsInVolume checks if a point is inside a trigger volume.\nfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) IsInVolume(triggerID string, x, y, z float64) bool {\n\treturn h.store.IsInVolume(triggerID, x, y, z)\n}\n\n// onTriggerFired is called by the volume store when a trigger fires.\nfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) onTriggerFired(event volume.FiredEvent) {\n\tt := h.store.GetTrigger(event.TriggerID)\n\tif t == nil {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Execute all actions\n\tfor _, action := range t.Actions {\n\t\th.executeAction(action, event)\n\t}\n\n\t// Broadcast trigger state to dashboard\n\th.mu.RLock()\n\tbroadcaster := h.wsBroadcaster\n\th.mu.RUnlock()\n\tif broadcaster != nil {\n\t\tbroadcaster.BroadcastTriggerState(t.ID, t.Name, event.Timestamp, t.Enabled)\n\t}\n\n\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Trigger fired: %s (%s, %d blob(s))\", t.Name, t.Condition, len(event.BlobIDs))\n}\n\n// executeAction executes a single trigger action.\nfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) executeAction(action volume.Action, event volume.FiredEvent) {\n\tswitch action.Type {\n\tcase \"webhook\":\n\t\th.executeWebhook(action, event)\n\tcase \"mqtt\":\n\t\th.executeMQTT(action, event)\n\tcase \"ntfy\", \"pushover\":\n\t\th.executeNotification(action, event)\n\t}\n}\n\n// doWebhookPost sends an HTTP POST and returns status code, latency, error.\n// This is the low-level webhook call shared by normal firing and test.\nfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) doWebhookPost(url string, data []byte, params map[string]interface{}) (statusCode int, latencyMs int64, err error) {\n\treq, err := http.NewRequest(\"POST\", url, bytes.NewReader(data))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn 0, 0, fmt.Errorf(\"create request: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\treq.Header.Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json\")\n\n\t// Add custom headers from action params\n\tfor k, v := range params {\n\t\tif k != \"url\" {\n\t\t\tif headerStr, ok := v.(string); ok {\n\t\t\t\treq.Header.Set(k, headerStr)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tstart := time.Now()\n\tresp, err := h.httpClient.Do(req)\n\tlatencyMs = time.Since(start).Milliseconds()\n\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn 0, latencyMs, fmt.Errorf(\"request failed: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\tdefer resp.Body.Close()\n\t// Drain body to allow connection reuse\n\tio.Copy(io.Discard, resp.Body)\n\n\treturn resp.StatusCode, latencyMs, nil\n}\n\n// executeWebhook sends an HTTP POST to a webhook URL with fault tolerance.\n// - 4xx: disable trigger, set error_message, push WS alert, log webhook_log\n// - 5xx / timeout: log warning, increment error_count, do NOT disable\n// - 2xx: reset error_count, log webhook_log\nfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) executeWebhook(action volume.Action, event volume.FiredEvent) {\n\turl, ok := action.Params[\"url\"].(string)\n\tif !ok || url == \"\" {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Webhook action missing URL\")\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Build payload per spec:\n\t// {trigger_id, trigger_name, condition, blob_id, person, position:{x,y,z}, zone, dwell_s, timestamp_ms}\n\tt := h.store.GetTrigger(event.TriggerID)\n\tpayload := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"trigger_id\":   event.TriggerID,\n\t\t\"trigger_name\":  t.Name,\n\t\t\"condition\":    t.Condition,\n\t\t\"blob_id\":      0,\n\t\t\"person\":       nil,\n\t\t\"position\":     map[string]float64{\"x\": 0, \"y\": 0, \"z\": 0},\n\t\t\"zone\":         nil,\n\t\t\"dwell_s\":      0,\n\t\t\"timestamp_ms\":  event.Timestamp.UnixMilli(),\n\t}\n\n\tdata, err := json.Marshal(payload)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Failed to marshal webhook payload: %v\", err)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tstatusCode, latencyMs, reqErr := h.doWebhookPost(url, data, action.Params)\n\tfiredAtMs := event.Timestamp.UnixMilli()\n\n\t// Log the attempt\n\tlogErr := \"\"\n\tif reqErr != nil {\n\t\tlogErr = reqErr.Error()\n\t}\n\th.store.WriteWebhookLog(event.TriggerID, url, firedAtMs, statusCode, latencyMs, logErr)\n\n\t// Error handling based on response class\n\tif reqErr != nil {\n\t\t// Timeout or network error — treat as 5xx-equivalent\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Webhook request failed for trigger %q: %v\", t.Name, reqErr)\n\t\th.store.IncrementErrorCount(event.TriggerID)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tif statusCode >= 400 && statusCode < 500 {\n\t\t// 4xx — client error, likely misconfigured URL\n\t\terrMsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"Webhook returned HTTP %d — trigger disabled. Fix the URL and re-enable.\", statusCode)\n\t\th.store.DisableTriggerWithError(event.TriggerID, errMsg)\n\n\t\t// Push WS alert to dashboard\n\t\th.mu.RLock()\n\t\tbroadcaster := h.wsBroadcaster\n\t\th.mu.RUnlock()\n\t\tif broadcaster != nil {\n\t\t\tbroadcaster.BroadcastAlert(\"trigger_disabled\", time.Now(), \"warning\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Trigger %q disabled: webhook returned HTTP %d\", t.Name, statusCode), false)\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tif statusCode >= 500 {\n\t\t// 5xx — server error, transient\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Webhook returned HTTP %d for trigger %q (server error, not disabling)\", statusCode, t.Name)\n\t\th.store.IncrementErrorCount(event.TriggerID)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// 2xx — success, reset error count\n\th.store.ResetErrorCount(event.TriggerID)\n\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Webhook delivered for trigger %q (HTTP %d, %dms)\", t.Name, statusCode, latencyMs)\n}\n\n// executeMQTT publishes to an MQTT topic.\nfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) executeMQTT(action volume.Action, event volume.FiredEvent) {\n\th.mu.RLock()\n\tclient := h.mqttClient\n\th.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\tif client == nil {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] MQTT client not configured\")\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tif !client.IsConnected() {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] MQTT client not connected\")\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\ttopic, ok := action.Params[\"topic\"].(string)\n\tif !ok || topic == \"\" {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] MQTT action missing topic\")\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tt := h.store.GetTrigger(event.TriggerID)\n\tpayload := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"trigger_id\":   event.TriggerID,\n\t\t\"trigger_name\":  t.Name,\n\t\t\"condition\":    t.Condition,\n\t\t\"fired_at\":     event.Timestamp.Format(time.RFC3339),\n\t\t\"blob_ids\":     event.BlobIDs,\n\t}\n\n\tdata, err := json.Marshal(payload)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Failed to marshal MQTT payload: %v\", err)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tif err := client.Publish(topic, data); err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] MQTT publish failed: %v\", err)\n\t}\n}\n\n// executeNotification sends a push notification.\nfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) executeNotification(action volume.Action, event volume.FiredEvent) {\n\th.mu.RLock()\n\tclient := h.notifyClient\n\th.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\tif client == nil {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Notification client not configured\")\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\ttitle := fmt.Sprintf(\"Spaxel Trigger: %s\", event.TriggerName)\n\tbody := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s triggered (%s)\", event.TriggerName, event.Condition)\n\n\tdata := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"trigger_id\":  event.TriggerID,\n\t\t\"trigger_name\": event.TriggerName,\n\t\t\"condition\":   event.Condition,\n\t\t\"timestamp\":   event.Timestamp.Unix(),\n\t}\n\n\tif err := client.SendViaChannel(action.Type, title, body, data); err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Notification failed: %v\", err)\n\t}\n}\n\n// broadcastTriggerState sends a trigger_state WebSocket message for a trigger by ID.\nfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) broadcastTriggerState(triggerID string) {\n\tt := h.store.GetTrigger(triggerID)\n\tif t == nil {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\th.mu.RLock()\n\tbroadcaster := h.wsBroadcaster\n\th.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\tif broadcaster != nil {\n\t\tvar lastFired time.Time\n\t\tif t.LastFired != nil {\n\t\t\tlastFired = *t.LastFired\n\t\t}\n\t\tbroadcaster.BroadcastTriggerState(t.ID, t.Name, lastFired, t.Enabled)\n\t}\n}\n\n// GetTriggerStates returns all trigger states for the dashboard snapshot/delta protocol.\n// Implements dashboard.TriggerState interface.\nfunc (h *VolumeTriggersHandler) GetTriggerStates() []map[string]interface{} {\n\ttriggers := h.store.GetAll()\n\tstates := make([]map[string]interface{}, 0, len(triggers))\n\tfor _, t := range triggers {\n\t\tstate := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\t\"id\":      t.ID,\n\t\t\t\"name\":    t.Name,\n\t\t\t\"enabled\": t.Enabled,\n\t\t}\n\t\tif t.LastFired != nil {\n\t\t\tstate[\"last_fired\"] = t.LastFired.UnixMilli()\n\t\t}\n\t\tstates = append(states, state)\n\t}\n\treturn states\n}\n","numLines":1034,"startLine":1,"totalLines":1034}}}

{\n199\t\t// Device endpoints\n200\t\tr.Get(\"/api/ble/devices\", h.listDevices)\n201\t\tr.Get(\"/api/ble/devices/{mac}\", h.getDevice)\n202\t\tr.Get(\"/api/ble/devices/{mac}/history\",
